name: Dog Fest Meat Slices Withgoose (55G)
description: Time to add a little wildness to your dog?s life. Tender goose meat strips are perfect for training as can be easily broken into smaller bits. Ingredients: duck 50%, goose 30%, vegetable by-products, minerals. Guaranteed analysis: crude protein 28%, crude fat 11%, crude fiber 1%, crude ash 5%, moisture 21%
